title: Codex Persistent Goals and Automatic Continuation · Control-Loop Lens: Automatic Continuation
summary: Operate a long Codex task with a persistent goal, checkpoints, and user control. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops automatic continuation increment in a Codex persistent-goal operating playbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design automatic continuation around verified progress and safe terminal conditions.
Keep long instructions in a referenced file while the goal remains concise.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
